fault_hypothesis: The code on line 73 incorrectly removes an element from the `merged` list when the last elements of both input streams are identical. This violates the requirement that all original elements must be preserved.

constraints.intent: The total number of merged elements must equal the sum of input elements; this pop violates that invariant.
The branch that removes a duplicate tail element should never be taken, as all elements should be preserved.
The pop operation must not cause the final list to have fewer elements than the sum of the inputs.
